creator: bsd@haps.ca
text:
Created attachment 200141
removes gnome clock, makes geoclue optional

The geo ip lookup stuff sucks in dbus.  So I've attached a patch that makes this horrid behaviour optional.  I mean, seriously folks, this is a nice lightweight port that's not encumbered by the kitchen sink crud that many x-related ports have. Optional isn't *that* hard.

Also, the gnome clock thing is causing configure to complain.  I've removed it in the patch.  Not using gnome, so I haven't tested with that flag enabled, but a cursory look through config indicates that it's not a thing.
